Method–provenance
Property: HOMO energy (Koopmans orbital energy) in eV

Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell); restricted SCF
Software: xtb 6.x via chemkit visualize-orbitals skill
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged; no engine warnings; density-fit not applicable; cube grid not requested. Result JSON integrity.trustworthy = true
